LAW AND MOTION, 302, AS TO PLAINTIFF PHILADELPHIA INDEMNITY INSURANCE COMPANY'S MOTION FOR DETERMINATION OF GOOD FAITH SETTLEMENT, THE COURT ADOPTS ITS TENTATIVE RULING AND CONTINUES THE MOTION TO BE HEARD ON AUGUST 31, 2017 AT 9:30 A.M. IN DEPARTMENT 501, THE REAL PROPERTY/HOUSING COURT. THE MOVING PARTY SHALL IMMEDIATELY PROVIDE A COURTESY COPY OF THE MOVING AND REPLY PAPERS WITH A COVER LETTER REFLECTING THE NEW HEARING DATE TO DEPARTMENT 501. THE COURT HAS THE OPPOSITION PAPERS. ALL FUTURE LAW AND MOTION MATTERS IN THIS CASE MUST BE NOTICED TO BE HEARD IN DEPARTMENT 501. JUDGE: SUZANNE R. BOLANOS, CLERK: M. GOODMAN, NOT REPORTED. (302/SRB)

MINI MINUTES FOR AUG-31-2017 09:30 AM FOR DEPT 501

REAL PROPERTY/HOUSING MOTION 501, PLAINTIFF PHILADELPHIA INDEMNITY INSURANCE COMPANY'S MOTION FOR DETERMINATION OF GOOD FAITH SETTLEMENT. THIS MATTER IS NOT ARGUED. THE COURT ADOPTS ITS TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS: GRANTED. MOVING PARTY HAS SHOWING THAT TECH-BUILT FACTORS ARE MET AND THE OPPOSING PARTY FAILED TO CARRY ITS BURNED TO SHOW THAT THE SETTLEMENT WAS NOT IN GOOD FAITH. PREVAILING PARTY TO SUBMIT A PROPOSED FORM OF ORDER IN COMPLIANCE WITH CRC 3.1312. JUDGE: RONALD E. QUIDACHAY, CLERK: E. LARNAUTI, NOT REPORTED

MOTION FOR DETERMINATION OF GOOD FAITH SETTLEMENT, ETC.
Off Calendar Aug-31-2017 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: PLAINTIFF PHILADELPHIA INDEMNITY INSURANCE COMPANY'S MOTION FOR DETERMINATION OF GOOD FAITH SETTLEMENT.

Appearances: Perry E. Rhoads of Robinson Di Lando, APLC (213.229.0100) appearing via Court Call for plaintiff and moving party; No other appearances.

This matter is not argued. The Court adopts its tentative ruling as follows: Granted.
